overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a vibrant futuristic cyberpunk city street. The player moves from an open sidewalk with graffiti walls past parked vehicles, along an elevated walkway with glass railings, and into a covered underpass with neon signage before reaching a crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city sidewalk with street parking and graffiti art

events.description: turns left from graffiti wall area onto main sidewalk path
green SUV drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the red-paved sidewalk, passing pedestrians and observing the futuristic street scene

notable_agents.action: woman in black dress walking toward camera on the sidewalk
green SUV driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: teal colored wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
multi-story red facade building with large rectangular windows
futuristic blue and white vending machine on the sidewalk
tall metal pole with traffic lights and signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beside a graffiti-covered teal wall on a futuristic city sidewalk. The camera walks forward along a red-paved path, passing a blue vending machine and approaching a street with moving traffic. A woman in a black dress walks toward the camera while a green SUV drives past on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railing approaching overpass

events.description: transitions to elevated walkway with white glass railing on the left side
slight right turn as walkway curves toward the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated walkway, passing other pedestrians and observing the street below

notable_agents.action: woman in white hat and red pants walking toward camera

entered.detail: modern white railing with vertical bars and glass panels running along the walkway edge
large concrete overpass structure spanning across the street ahead
black street sign with white NOKOTA text and directional arrow hanging over the road

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an elevated walkway with a distinctive white glass railing on the left. The camera walks forward as the red building looms closer on the right. A NOKOTA street sign becomes visible hanging over the road ahead, and the walkway leads toward a large concrete overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass with neon signage and scattered debris

events.description: enters covered underpass beneath the overpass structure
begins descending ramp toward street level and crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered underpass, descending the ramp toward the street level crosswalk

notable_agents.action: woman in gray jacket and white hair walking up the ramp toward camera

entered.detail: underside of the concrete overpass creating a covered tunnel-like walkway
teal and green painted building facade with windows and air conditioning units
large red illuminated billboard with white text and graphics
scattered litter and debris accumulated along the right wall of the underpass

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered underpass beneath the overpass, where the lighting becomes mixed with natural light from the ends and artificial neon glow. The walkway descends toward street level, passing trash debris along the right wall and a green building on the left. A woman walks up the ramp toward the camera as the path leads down to a crosswalk visible at the tunnel's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, graffiti-lined sidewalk into the shadowed depths of a neon-lit urban underpass. It begins beside a teal wall on a red-paved path, moving past a blue vending machine as a woman in a black dress approaches and a green SUV drives by. As the camera advances, the scene shifts onto an elevated walkway defined by a white glass railing, leading the viewer toward a looming red building and a hanging NOKOTA street sign. The path then transitions into a covered underpass beneath a concrete overpass, where natural light blends with an artificial neon glow. Finally, the camera descends a ramp past scattered debris and a green building, passing another pedestrian before reaching a crosswalk at the tunnel's exit.
